summary: High‑energy show with every tune a highlight and solid recording quality despite no explicit technical notes.
review: Both reviewers gush about the performance, calling it "HOT" and noting that every song shines – especially the quirky turn‑around lick Garcia slips into on “One Kind Favor.” No specific comments on the tape’s source or fidelity were made, suggesting a generally good but unverified recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Enthusiastic 4‑ and 5‑star reviews focus on an outstanding musical performance; lack of recording details limits certainty, yielding a solid but not absolute rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss soundboard vs. audience or any audio issues, implying the recording is at least listenable with no obvious problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer enthusiasm suggests a seamless set where every song felt like a highlight, indicating strong pacing and flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia recycles a turnaround lick from Minglewood during “One Kind Favor,” noted as a fun moment.
